programa: Programa 30: Los Medios de Comunicación y La Cultura Pop

sets.titulo: La Televisión, El Cine y La Radio

preparate.contexto: Esa cadena de televisión tiene los mejores programas deportivos.

El último episodio de la serie me dejó en suspenso.

Prefiero ver películas extranjeras con subtítulos.

Un oyente llamó a la estación para pedir una canción.

Los músicos entraron al estudio para grabar el álbum.

No me gusta el cine doblado, las voces no encajan.
El concierto fue transmitido en directo por televisión.
No te sientes tan cerca de la pantalla del televisor.

cardio.clue_en: A group of broadcasting stations that connect for the simultaneous broadcast of a program.
A band of frequencies used in radio and television transmission.
Each of the separate installments into which a serialized television program is divided.
A set or sequence of related television programs.
A television drama series dealing typically with daily events in the lives of the same group of characters.
A movie or a television or radio program that provides a factual record or report.
A videotaped performance of a recorded popular song.
The music accompanying a film or television show.
Illusions or visual tricks used in the film, television, theatre, or video game industries.
Captions displayed at the bottom of a movie or television screen.
A company or organization that broadcasts radio programs.
A person who introduces or hosts a radio broadcast.
A person who tunes in to a radio broadcast.
A person who watches television.
To store sounds or moving pictures on a tape or digital file.

cardio.clue_es: Capturar imágenes con una cámara para hacer una película.

Transmitido en el momento en que ocurre; no pregrabado.

Película informativa sobre animales, historia o ciencia.
Todo el audio y las canciones oficiales de una película.
Trucos visuales generados por computadora (CGI).
Las palabras traducidas en la parte inferior del cine.
La persona que escucha un programa de radio.
La persona que mira programas en el televisor.
Hablar frente a un micrófono para registrar el sonido para siempre.

sets.titulo: La Fama, La Cultura Pop y La Publicidad

cardio.clue_en: Modern popular culture transmitted via mass media and aimed particularly at younger people.
A famous person, especially in entertainment or sport.
A famous singer or musician in the pop music genre.
A person who has a strong interest in or admiration for a particular person or thing.
A person who writes reviews of movies for newspapers or websites.
Ordinary people in general; the audience.
Casual conversations or reports about other people, typically involving details that are not confirmed as being true.
The state of being known or talked about by many people.
A general direction in which something is developing or changing; a popular style.
An intense and widely shared enthusiasm for something, especially one that is short-lived.
The activity or profession of producing advertisements for commercial products or services.
A notice or announcement in a public medium promoting a product.
A signature of a famous person.
To gain fame.
To have a positive reputation.

cardio.clue_es: Tener una reputación negativa; ser conocido por cosas malas.

Que es popular o es el estilo del momento.

cardio.clue_en: A printed publication containing news, typically published daily.

A person who reads or is subscribed to a publication.

cardio.clue_en: The main means of mass communication regarded collectively.
Information about recent events in a specific town or region.

A spoken or written account of something that one has observed, heard, or investigated.
A person employed to gather and report news for a media organization.

A thing that happens, especially one of importance.

A person, book, or document that provides information or evidence.
To carry out a systematic or formal inquiry to discover and examine the facts.
To find out or become informed about something.
To keep informed about a changing situation.
Incorporating the latest developments and trends.
Recently received information about an event that is currently occurring or developing.

cardio.clue_es: Adjetivo para alguien importante, famoso o que sobresale.

Prejuicio a favor o en contra de una cosa, persona o grupo.
